problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Dopamine/serotonin. Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
